request: epic-close full-bundle archival when children resolve (backlog -02a3): add an /epic-close step or last-child hook that, when every .claude/state/epic/<slug>.json children[] entry is status: committed, moves the discovery bundle (sliced spec/scout/research at docs/.../<epic>.md) to docs/archive/<date>/<epic>/ and closes the epic. The epic track (seed 18.9) deliberately omits archive so children can pin live discovery; nothing archives the bundle on epic completion.
